form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 13 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 4 len behind The Specialist carrying 54kg at $17. Before that 3rd in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Rafa Bay carrying 54kg at $7. Among the winning chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Most recently 5th of 13 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 4 len behind The Specialist carrying 54kg at $17. Before that 3rd in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Rafa Bay carrying 54kg at $7. Among the winning chances.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 11 at this track on April 4 over 1160m, 8 len behind Rock Of Bismantova carrying 61kg at $13.50. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Halberdier carrying 61kg at $8. Better than that recent plain performance suggests.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(18.5). Last start second last of 11 at this track on April 4 over 1160m, 8 len behind Rock Of Bismantova carrying 61kg at $13.50. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Halberdier carrying 61kg at $8. Better than that recent plain performance suggests.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out away from the crop from the 150m.
At approximately the 200m, carried in marginally by One Eye On Vegas.
Rolled out making contact with Lovegrass and was immediately straightened.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 31-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 7 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Halberdier carrying 58.5kg at $4.50. The start before that won by 1.0 len at Vaal February 10 over 1000m defeating Stoneywood with 56.5kg at $6. In great form and looks a leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Racing well recently. Comes here off a 31-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 7 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Halberdier carrying 58.5kg at $4.50. The start before that won by 1.0 len at Vaal February 10 over 1000m defeating Stoneywood with 56.5kg at $6. In great form and looks a leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted both ways away from the crop from the 300m.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Comes off a 57 day let-up. First-up 3rd of 7 at Vaal on January 22 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind The Specialist with 54.5kg at $3.80. Last start 5th of 11 at this track on February 14 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sunset Riot with 54.5kg at $4.30. Back in grade and worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Comes off a 57 day let-up. First-up 3rd of 7 at Vaal on January 22 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind The Specialist with 54.5kg at $3.80. Last start 5th of 11 at this track on February 14 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sunset Riot with 54.5kg at $4.30. Back in grade and worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced in the early and middle stages.
Bumped in by Constellation shortly after the start.
Jumped awkwardly inwards leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resumes off a 38 day letup. Resuming 3rd of 8 at Vaal on February 10 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind His Lordship carrying 55.5kg at $9. Last start favourite; won by 0.9 len at Vaal March 5 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Blindfire carrying 61kg at $2. In form and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Third-up today. Resumes off a 38 day letup. Resuming 3rd of 8 at Vaal on February 10 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind His Lordship carrying 55.5kg at $9. Last start favourite; won by 0.9 len at Vaal March 5 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Blindfire carrying 61kg at $2. In form and expected to go close again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, came together and brushed Gold Platina.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 13 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 13 len behind The Specialist carrying 52kg at $26. The race before that won by 0.8 len at Turffontein Inside March 12 over 1000m in soft going defeating His Lordship with 56.5kg at $9. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Last start second last of 13 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 13 len behind The Specialist carrying 52kg at $26. The race before that won by 0.8 len at Turffontein Inside March 12 over 1000m in soft going defeating His Lordship with 56.5kg at $9. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 6th of 11 at this track on April 4 over 1160m, 2.5 len behind Rock Of Bismantova with 59kg at $34. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Vaal on October 23 over 1200m, neck behind Mister Wilson with 55.5kg at $13.50. Should progress from that first-up run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(18.5). Second run back. First-up after two months 6th of 11 at this track on April 4 over 1160m, 2.5 len behind Rock Of Bismantova with 59kg at $34. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Vaal on October 23 over 1200m, neck behind Mister Wilson with 55.5kg at $13.50. Should progress from that first-up run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 250m, brushed in by Drivelikeamaster.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 47-day let-up. First-up after two months second last in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 3 len behind Rafa Bay carrying 50kg at $8. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Vaal on June 19 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Jet Cat carrying 61.5kg at $13.50. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Second run back. Comes off a 47-day let-up. First-up after two months second last in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 3 len behind Rafa Bay carrying 50kg at $8. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Vaal on June 19 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Jet Cat carrying 61.5kg at $13.50. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Shortly after the start, bumped in by Banyan.

form.formComment: Returns from a 61-day let-up. Last start ran last of 8 at Vaal on February 10 over 1000m, 6 len behind His Lordship carrying 56.5kg at $9. The race before that 2nd of 17 at this track on January 11 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind There She Goes carrying 61kg at $21. Can't see him troubling these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Returns from a 61-day let-up. Last start ran last of 8 at Vaal on February 10 over 1000m, 6 len behind His Lordship carrying 56.5kg at $9. The race before that 2nd of 17 at this track on January 11 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind There She Goes carrying 61kg at $21. Can't see him troubling these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped awkwardly leaving the stalls. Hung in from 300m.
